content:
These notices have been bugging me for a long time, and I want to change it since it's sufficiently misleading. 
These notices are older than the Forbidden Lore system, and testing has shown that because of that, the circumstances that trigger these notices are sometimes strange (see below) so honestly the best course of action here is to **ping <@1376763322568937562> and hope it gets relayed to Light and the team** to be changed someday.

In the mean time, I'm going to put a quick fix patch on the problem by changing "Your Awakeners' attributes will be weakened" to "The investigation may encounter significant challenges" until the notices themselves can be addressed later on.

here's some details on what I mentioned about the trigger circumstances:
<:check:983712745578987531> - Level is sufficient
❌ - Level is too low

Keeper Level <:check:983712745578987531>, Team Level ❌:
> The current team's average level {s1} is lower than the recommended level {s2}. The investigation may encounter significant challenges. Confirm?

Keeper Level ❌, Team Level ❌:
> Your team's average level {s1} and your Keeper level {s2} are both too low for this stage. Your Awakeners' attributes will be weakened. Proceed anyway?

Keeper Level ❌, Team Level <:check:983712745578987531>:
> Your team's average level {s1} is lower than the recommended level {s2}. Your Awakeners' attributes will be weakened. Proceed anyway?

This is the anomalous one, as my team's level (67) IS sufficient for the stage (66) but my Keeper level (65) is not, but it still says "team's average level is lower". With the new Forbidden Lore system, __this notice should not exist.__

Here are my suggestions for future changes to these notices:

They should directly reference Forbidden Lore and help explain that mechanic to the player. At a minimum, I think the notices should say something along the lines of:

Forbidden Lore ❌, Team Level ❌:
> Your Forbidden Lore level (`X`) is lower than recommended (`X`).
> Your stats, such as Max HP and Relic potency, may be lower than intended for this stage.
> Check "Forbidden Lore" under "Team Info" above for more information.
> Proceed with investigation anyway?

Forbidden Lore <:check:983712745578987531>, Team Level ❌:
> Your Awakeners' average level (`X`) is lower than recommended (`X`).
> Their attributes (CON, ATK, DEF) may be lower than intended, and the investigation may encounter significant challenges.
> Proceed with investigation anyway?
